title: Accessible Play Project
description:
Binfield Parish Council invites tenders from suitably qualified and experienced contractors for the design, supply and installation of accessibility and inclusion improvements at the following three Council open spaces: 
1. Foxley Fields 
2. Wicks Green / Silver Jubilee 
3. York Road
